title: Mission to Orinackra

|name=Mission to Orinackra
|conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] ([[Dark Trooper Project]])
|objective=Rescue [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]
|date=[[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]<ref name="Madine">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}} places the outbreak of the [[Candorian plague/Legends|Candorian plague]] on [[Dentaal]] on 36:2:12, which falls in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. {{FactFile|130|MAD 1-4|General Crix Madine}} tie together the events of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' and [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']], and Madine's own recollections in [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] as follows: upon learning of the [[Dark Trooper Project]], Madine alerts the Rebel Alliance to the project's existence, thus starting the events of ''Dark Forces''. Shortly afterwards, Madine is ordered to release the Candorian plague on Dentaal, an event which is dated to 36:2:12 per the Adventure Journal. Madine vanishes into the wilderness shortly afterwards, spending a week in the jungles of Dentaal before escaping and fleeing the planet—only to be captured almost immediately by General [[Rom Mohc]] and imprisoned on [[Orinackra]]. Kyle Katarn then frees Madine from Orinackra, and Madine is then involved in the [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|battle]] at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' states that only a short amount of time passed between Madine telling the Alliance about the Dark Troopers and his defection. The length of time Madine spends on the run places his capture and imprisonment on Orinackra firmly in the month 36:3, or the first month of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Therefore, the events of ''Dark Forces'' prior to the [[mission to Orinackra]] fall in 0 ABY, and the remainder of the game and the battle at Corellia both occur in 1 ABY.</ref>
|place=[[Imperial Detention Center]], [[Orinackra]]

{{Quote|We owe this to Crix. Without his work, we wouldn't have known about the dark trooper project until it was too late to make any difference. Besides, I've seen what the Empire does to spies. Not a pretty sight.|Kyle Katarn|<ref name="Dark Forces Official Player's Guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>}}
After [[General/Legends|General]] [[Rom Mohc]] captured the defector [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], Madine was imprisoned on [[Orinackra]], leading [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] to '''rescue''' him.

[[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] arrived on [[Orinackra]] in the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'', and Katarn battled his way through the detention facility's defenses. Beginning from the higher levels, he descended with an elevator to the command center. From there he ascended again to the higher levels where the high security cells were. Katarn was able to obtain the card key to Madine's holding cell and freed the former Imperial.

Madine slipped back to his homeworld of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], where the Imperials [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|tried capturing]] him again, requiring [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to provide support.

==Behind the scenes==
The Mission to Orinackra first appeared in the [[1995]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]], ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'', starring Kyle Katarn.
